title: Qlog Baseline Implementation Lane
summary: Create the first implementation lane for Incursa.Qlog around the core qlog model, serialization envelope, and QUIC vocabulary adapter. Keep the baseline narrow enough to support requirement-by-requirement delivery without importing the heavy quic-dotnet backlog machinery.
planned_changes: Introduce core trace, event, and envelope contracts for Incursa.Qlog; add QUIC-specific mapping types that translate transport state into the qlog vocabulary; and keep serializer-specific work behind the core model boundary so later sinks can be added deliberately.
out_of_scope: HTTP/3 adapters in the first baseline.
Non-JSON sinks or transport layers that are not required by the draft source material.
Large work-item backlogs, phase prompts, or chunk-manifest machinery.
Fake completeness or fabricated verification evidence.
verification_plan: Use focused unit and contract tests for the core qlog envelope and QUIC vocabulary shapes; add JSON snapshot checks for draft-specific output; and keep the repository-level SpecTrace validation script in the loop before the implementation grows.
